strategy: Drowned Dan is immune to damage under an Invulnerability aura. You cannot hurt him until you solve his four-number code.
The code is four pip costs. The first number is revealed at Round 2; each time you defeat his Sunken Sam minion the next number appears the following round.
To unlock him, target HIM with spells whose pip cost matches each code number in order (for example, code 1-5-2-7 means hit him with a 1-pip, then 5-pip, then 2-pip, then 7-pip spell).
Kill the minion, read the next digit, feed the matching pip-cost spell. A wrong answer resets the whole sequence, so go carefully.
Once all four are correct the aura drops. Then hit with Death (+30%) or any non-Life school to finish him off.
cheatNotes: He wears an Invulnerability aura making him immune to all damage until you crack his code. Do not waste hits before it is down.

The code is four pip costs revealed one at a time: the first at Round 2, each next digit after you defeat a Sunken Sam. Cast spells at him whose pip cost matches each number in order to strip the aura.
A wrong pip-cost answer resets the sequence to the start. Track the revealed digits carefully before responding.
